23801159.title: Guilford Press

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Publisher in New York, United States

23801159.description: Publisher in New York, United States
23801159.extract: Guilford Press or Guilford Publications, Inc. is a New York City-based independent publisher founded in 1973 that specializes in publishing books, journals, and digital content in psychology, psychiatry, the behavioral sciences, education, geography, and research methods.
